zh.Balaguères, Ariège, Occitanie, France: 法國奧其坦尼阿利艾巴拉艾雷斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Guillaume I de Forcalquier於1085年出生在法國奧其坦尼阿利艾巴拉艾雷斯時，他的父親Armengol IV "el de Gerp" Count of Urgell35歲，母親Adélaïde DE PROVENCE25歲。他於1100年與Gersende Albon在法國普洛福-阿爾培-o特 達阿爾阿爾培-德-豪-普洛福斯福爾卡爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1129年10月7日在法國普洛福-阿爾培-o特 達阿爾瓦歐可盧斯阿維尼享年44歲。

zh-hans.Balaguères, Ariège, Occitanie, France: 法国奧其坦尼阿利艾巴拉艾雷斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Guillaume I de Forcalquier于1085年出生在法国奧其坦尼阿利艾巴拉艾雷斯时，他的父亲Armengol IV "el de Gerp" Count of Urgell35岁，母亲Adélaïde DE PROVENCE25岁。他于1100年与Gersende Albon在法国普洛福-阿爾培-o特 達阿爾阿爾培-德-豪-普洛福斯福爾卡爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1129年10月7日在法国普洛福-阿爾培-o特 達阿爾瓦歐可盧斯阿維尼享年44岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Guillaume
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: William
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Guillaume I de Forcalquier was born in 1085, in Balaguères, Ariège, Occitanie, France, his father, Armengol IV "el de Gerp" Count of Urgell, was 35 and his mother, Adélaïde DE PROVENCE, was 25. He married Gersende Albon in 1100, in Forcalquier, Alpes-de-Haute-Provence, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 7 October 1129, in Avignon, Vaucluse, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France, at the age of 44.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guillaume I de Forcalquier est né en 1085, à Balaguères, Ariège, Occitanie, France, son père, Armengol IV "el de Gerp" Count of Urgell, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Adélaïde DE PROVENCE, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Gersende Albon en 1100, à Forcalquier, Alpes-de-Haute-Provence, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 7 octobre 1129, à Avignon, Vaucluse, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France, à l’âge de 44 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Guillaume I de Forcalquier 1085 in Balaguères, Ariège, Occitanie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Armengol IV "el de Gerp" Count of Urgell 35 und seine Mutter Adélaïde DE PROVENCE 25. Er hat 1100 in Forcalquier, Alpes-de-Haute-Provence, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Frankreich Gersende Albon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 7. Oktober 1129 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Avignon, Vaucluse, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Guillaume I de Forcalquier è nato il nel 1085 nel Balaguères, Ariège, Occitanie, Francia, il suo padre, Armengol IV "el de Gerp" Count of Urgell, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Adélaïde DE PROVENCE, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Gersende Albon nel 1100, nel Forcalquier, Alpes-de-Haute-Provence, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 7 ottobre 1129, nel Avignon, Vaucluse, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Francia, all'età di 44 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Guillaume I de Forcalquierが1085年にフランスオクシタニーアリeッジボーアグeレスで生まれた時，父Armengol IV "el de Gerp" Count of Urgellは35歳，母Adélaïde DE PROVENCEは25歳であった。1100年にフランスプローベンセ-アルペス-クoト ド'アズルアルペス-デ-ハウテ-プローベンスフォーカルクイエルでGersende Albonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1129年10月7日にフランスプローベンセ-アルペス-クoト ド'アズルヴァウクルゼアヴィグノンで44歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Guillaume I de Forcalquier(이)가 1085년 프랑스 옥시탠이 애리e지 밸라구e레스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Armengol IV "el de Gerp" Count of Urgell(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Adélaïde DE PROVENCE(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1100년 프랑스 프로븐스-알페스-co트 드'아저 알페스-데-하테-프로븐스 포캘키어에서 Gersende Albon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1129년 10월 7일 프랑스 프로븐스-알페스-co트 드'아저 바c루스 아비뇰에서 44세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guillaume I de Forcalquier nasceu em 1085, em Balaguères, Ariège, Occitanie, França, seu pai, Armengol IV "el de Gerp" Count of Urgell, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Adélaïde DE PROVENCE, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Gersende Albon em 1100, em Forcalquier, Alpes-de-Haute-Provence, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 7 de outubro de 1129, em Avignon, Vaucluse, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, França, com 44 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guillaume I de Forcalquier родился в 1085 г. в местности балагуeресь, ариeдж, окситани, Франция, его отцу по имени Armengol IV "el de Gerp" Count of Urgell было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Adélaïde DE PROVENCE, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Gersende Albon в 1100 г. в местности форкалкуиир, алпес-де-хауте-провенс, провенсе-алпес-кoт д'азур, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 7 октября 1129 г. в местности авигнон, вауклус, провенсе-алпес-кoт д'азур, Франция в возрасте 44 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Guillaume I de Forcalquier nació en 1085, en Balaguères, Ariège, Occitanie, Francia, su papá, Armengol IV "el de Gerp" Count of Urgell, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Adélaïde DE PROVENCE, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Gersende Albon en 1100, en Forcalquier, Alpes-de-Haute-Provence, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 7 de octubre de 1129, en Avignon, Vaucluse, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Francia, a la edad de 44 años.
